title: Eve's Lover
writer: Darryl F. Zanuck, Mrs. W.K. Clifford
actors: Irene Rich, Bert Lytell, Clara Bow
plot: Austin Starfield (Louis) has his greedy eye on a steel mill belonging to Eve Burnside (Rich). He persuades an impoverished count, Leon Molnar (Lytell) to marry Eve so he can then gain control of her fortune. Leon marries her, but ...
